name: DeepSeek
steps: Create an account or sign in
Create a new API key and copy it (starts with sk-...)
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
notes: Prepaid balance required. Very affordable: $0.28/M input, $0.42/M output. Automatic cache hits at $0.028/M. Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner share the same key and endpoint.
